approvalSource: Steve asked for a codebase map for agentic use and told Codex to keep going, park blockers, and pick the next best scoped card. Approval is for a read-only AIOS-owned repo-map proof only: no third-party plugin install, no generated graph commit, no private/local file scan, no source extraction, no provider call, and no external write.
constraints: Exclude MEMORY.md, USER.md, TOOLS.md, memory/, .openclaw/, .claude/, .env, docs/_archive/, and docs/conversation-archive/
Do not install Understand-Anything or any third-party plugin
Do not create symlinks or generated knowledge graph artifacts
Do not run model/provider calls, browser/source extraction, backlog writes, or external writes
